title: Employee completes Aadhaar OTP onboarding and reaches the correct dashboard
description: Verifies that an employee can verify Aadhaar with OTP, select scope details, and land on the appropriate role dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the Aadhaar number field with a valid Aadhaar number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Select a valid portfolio or jurisdiction
Verify the role-specific dashboard is displayed
Verify the saved scope is reflected in the dashboard

title: Citizen completes phone OTP login and enters the portal
description: Verifies that a citizen can request OTP, confirm their phone, complete profile details, and successfully enter the grievance portal.

steps.description: Fill in the phone number field with a valid mobile number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the pincode field with a valid pincode
Verify the user enters the portal
Verify the citizen profile is completed

title: Employee is routed to the correct dashboard after onboarding for a selected role
description: Verifies that choosing a supported role routes the employee to the matching dashboard after scope save.

steps.description: Fill in the Aadhaar number field with a valid Aadhaar number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Select a role that maps to a district-level dashboard
Verify the corresponding role dashboard is displayed

title: Employee returns to the app and lands on the saved dashboard
description: Verifies that a scoped employee can revisit the app and be directed to the previously saved dashboard without repeating onboarding.

steps.description: Fill in the Aadhaar number field with a valid Aadhaar number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Select a valid portfolio or jurisdiction
Verify the saved role dashboard is displayed

title: Employee must choose category role and jurisdiction before continuing
description: Verifies that scope selection is required before an employee can access a dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the Aadhaar number field with a valid Aadhaar number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Verify a scope validation error is visible
Select a valid portfolio or jurisdiction
Verify the role-specific dashboard is displayed

title: Citizen must provide required profile details before entering the portal
description: Verifies that a citizen cannot finish login until the required name, pincode, and location fields are completed.

steps.description: Fill in the phone number field with a valid mobile number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Verify a profile completion validation error is visible
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the pincode field with a valid pincode
Verify the user enters the portal

title: Protected dashboard routes block unauthenticated access
description: Verifies that directly visiting a protected dashboard route does not expose dashboard content to an unauthenticated user.

steps.description: Verify the user is blocked from accessing protected dashboard content
Verify a login or access prompt is visible

title: Employee can retry an incorrect Aadhaar OTP and finish onboarding
description: Verifies that an employee can recover from a wrong OTP entry and complete onboarding successfully afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the Aadhaar number field with a valid Aadhaar number
Fill in the OTP field with an invalid 6-digit code
Verify an OTP validation error is visible
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Select a valid portfolio or jurisdiction
Verify the role-specific dashboard is displayed

title: Citizen can retry with an incorrect OTP and then sign in successfully
description: Verifies that a citizen can recover from a wrong OTP entry and still complete login after submitting a valid OTP.

steps.description: Fill in the phone number field with a valid mobile number
Fill in the OTP field with an invalid 6-digit code
Verify an OTP validation error is visible
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the pincode field with a valid pincode
Verify the user enters the portal

title: Citizen must enter a valid phone number to request OTP
description: Verifies that invalid citizen phone input is rejected and OTP flow does not proceed until a valid number is entered.

steps.description: Fill in the phone number field with an invalid phone number
Verify a phone validation error is visible
Fill in the phone number field with a valid mobile number
Verify the OTP step is displayed
